emails.subject: FW: Current Enron TCC Portfolio
emails.body: Rebecca, Let me know if you see any differences. Paul X 3-0403 To: Ahmed, Naveed

emails.subject: RE: Current Enron TCC Portfolio
emails.body: RE: Current Enron TCC Portfolio Paul, I reviewed NY's list. I agree with all of their contracts numbers and mw amounts. Call if you have any more questions. Rebecca To: Grace, Rebecca M.
